jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Lybrate
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
